response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r1c0 is 0.10 below threshold with normal urgency; conservative policy permits sharing when peer demonstrates reciprocal acceptance pattern and 0.5 kWh preserves our islanded stability.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded with declining SoC; peers r1c0, r2c1, r3c0 show reciprocal acceptance pattern. Conservative sharing preserves self-sufficiency while honoring geographic round-robin. No trust circles established; rely on demonstrated reciprocity..
